message:
fix(pager): repair change_counter and version_valid_for in checkpoint sync

Write the current commit sequence number into page-1 header offsets 24
and 92 during checkpoint sync so that downstream readers see a valid
change counter and version-valid-for stamp instead of stale zeros.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
